features.name: zero_width_integer_type
features.description: Code should include a zero-width integer type declaration or usage in hardware dialect context

features.name: singleton_array_get_with_zero_width_index
features.description: Code should include an array_get operation on a singleton array (1-element array) with a zero-width index type

features.name: zero_width_constant
features.description: Code should include a hw.constant with zero-width integer type

extraction_summary.note: PR about MLIR HW dialect zero-width type support; no SystemVerilog code blocks present. Features extracted from description of changes to hw.i0 type, hw.array_get for singleton arrays, and hw.constant with i0 type.
